training_status: lifting 3x/week with difficulty, 1-2 cardio sessions/week, 6-7k steps daily

compounds.frequency: 6 nights on, 1 night off per week

protocol_notes: Functional medicine provider prescribed 4-6 days/week for up to 8 months for longer-term use. OP reduced dose from provider recommendation due to medication sensitivity. Dosing calculated as 25 units from 12mg bottle reconstituted with 6ml water. Also taking Cymbalta (duloxetine) for nerve pain and Lyrica (pregabalin) for nerve pain, which can cause insulin resistance and reduced appetite. Height 5'5". Scale weight up 1-2lbs trend over approximately 1-2 months, with suspected 1lb being water weight. Primary goal is nerve growth post-surgery; secondary goal is body recomposition. OP notes most cited results come from male users.
